inline_comments.message:
Noticed OOM input file contains only PRH image/tag update currently. 

I suppose this change in default will require either regenerating the bootstrap container (and re-release) or adding these default explicitly under OOM charts for PRH input - https://git.onap.org/oom/tree/kubernetes/dcaegen2/charts/dcae-bootstrap/resources/inputs/k8s-prh-inputs.yaml

If Nokia team is comfortable making the input changes under OOM - we can proceed with that option.
Files under reference_templates are not required to be updated. This version is docker blueprint - not used in ONAP deploy anymore.

Just Fyi - this input file is no longer used; this is replaced by input under OOM charts. 

I will remove input-templates dir part of subsequent patch to avoid confusion.

Hello Vijay,

Do you mean there are 2 equal ways for providing default values:
1) via OOM  input
2) bootstrap container?

For services instantiated through DCAE bootstrap, input defaults can be specified both ways - either under OOM charts or blueprint defaults (which gets packaged into bootstrap pod). 

When OOM chart derived input is available, that will take precedence. For the input not explicitly specified from OOM chart, defaults from blueprints will be used.
